status.text: Node with id '%1%' could not be found
status.description: The application attempt to find or operate on a Node an id that could not be found.

status.text: Operation cannot be done on a node in static location '%1%'
status.description: Operation cannot be done on node in static location

The application tried to set a property within a test server configuration object to an value that is not valid for the particualr property.
The text portion of the error describes:
- The name of the property that is invalid, e.g. 'ipAddress' - The invalid value, e.g. '1000.2000.3000.4000' - Extra runtime specific text that describes why the value is invalid.

status.text: Please assign a Port for the Port Group '%1%'
status.description: Port Group does not contain any port. Use Assign Port(s) button to select port for the port group.

status.text: Invalid IP v4/v6 Address '%2%' for property '%1%'. %3%
status.description: The application tried to apply an invalid ip v4/v6address to an aptixia property
The application tried to apply an invalid mac address to an aptixia property
The application tried to apply an invalid mac address to an aptixia property
The application tried to apply an invalid vlan priority value to an aptixia property
The application tried to apply an invalid vlan priority id to an aptixia property
